title: Goety-Fabric
description: An unofficial Fabric port of Goety. Perform necromancy and dark rituals using the power of souls
body:
## Goety-Fabric

This mod is an unofficial Fabric port of [Goety](https://modrinth.com/mod/goety), **please don't report any bug of this mod to official Goety repo**.

Goety is a magic mod that aims to enhance the Minecraft experience by adding a ton of new features, including mobs, structures and a way to harness the power of the arcane. Summon all kinds of minions, fight off new dangers, discover the secrets of the world, its lore and most importantly, its treasures.

Some contents may not be the same as original Goety due to the difference of FabricAPI and ForgeAPI, and the corresponding version may slightly outdated.

**Note:**
- **This mod requires [Forge Config API Port](https://modrinth.com/mod/forge-config-api-port), [Trinkets](https://modrinth.com/mod/trinkets)**
- **Your FabricLoader version must be >=0.18.5 due to requiring MixinExtras-0.5.3**.
- **If you installed [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)(version<0.6.0), you must install [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium) as well, or else some rendering issues may occur.**

### Permissions:
![Polarice's permission](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c63e3b5642e6962c3d55e3b9cb28e26e632dd37.png)
![Box's permission](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b81b1fd31e927ed09730bd13ffa05b434bcdc548.png)

### Credits:

Thanks [Polarice3](https://github.com/Polarice3), [Box](https://legacy.curseforge.com/members/boxknight/followers) and other all developers&contributors of Goety.

Translations:

- Player_7, NUTTAR. Chinese Translation, Goety 2.
- SAGA, 坂上駒子. Japanese Translation, Goety 2.
- .cool_nickname. Russian Translation. Goety 2.

Builders:

- [boxman](https://legacy.curseforge.com/members/boxknight/followers). Builder of Graveyards, Blighted Shacks, Wind Shrines, Ominous Blacksmiths and Buried Rituals.
- TruffleHistorian. Builder of Dark Manors and Wind Shrines.

Sounds:

- Iron dude#5194. Providing Sounds for several mobs for the 1.16 version.

Integration:

- Vazkii, williewillus & Hubry - Patchouli
- Emily Rose Ploszaj - Trinkets

Textures & Models:

- zozozrob - Several textures for items and blocks for Goety 2.5.22.0+ and 2.41.0+
- Mongoose - Several textures for items and blocks.
- amyspiralvt - Several textures for items and focuses.
- Foxmos Pumpkin - Skeleton Servant Texture based on their Skeleton Texture
- x3n0ph0b3/Pahimar - Rings Texture based on their Swiftwolf's Rending Gale ring.
- Yoler_Toons - Bear Servant Texture based on their Polar Bear Texture.
- EmptyCoso - Void Flames & Chorus Door Textures.
- vulkan9346 - Ender Keeper texture and model
- joturtleguy21 - Ender Keeper animations.
- LeoLezury - Summon, shoot indicator and afterimage effects.
- luomu05 - Piker, Conquillager and Maverick remodels.
- Yogscast - Fallen Textures based on some characters from their Shadow of Israphel webseries.


Other:

- Akogiri - For suggesting to split the original mod to two to deal with bloat.
